---
name: Bug report
about: Report something that is not working as expected
title: ''
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

**Describe the bug**
A clear description of what went wrong and what you expected instead.

**Reproducible example**
A small, self-contained example helps a great deal. If it involves a plot, a
screenshot of the result is useful too.

```python
# your example here
```

**Environment**
<details>

```
# Python version, depictr version (depictr.__version__), operating system,
# and whether the optional back-ends (statsmodels, scikit-learn, lifelines)
# are installed if the problem involves those plots.
```

</details>

**Anything else**
Any other context that might help.
